nasb.text: When He had said this, one of the officers standing nearby struck Jesus, saying, “Is that the way You answer the high priest?”

esv.text: When he had said these things, one of the officers standing by struck Jesus with his hand, saying, “Is that how you answer the high priest?”

cnv.text: 耶穌說了這些話，站在旁邊的一個差役，就打他一巴掌，說：“你竟敢這樣回答大祭司嗎？”

ccb.text: 耶稣话才说完，站在旁边的差役就打了祂一耳光，说：“你敢这样回答大祭司！”

csbs.text: 耶稣说了这些话，站在旁边的一个差役就打了他一巴掌，说：“你这样回答大祭司吗？”
